h1: 11 kg Front Load Washing Machine | ThinQ (Wi-Fi) | Middle Black

gallery.a: Front view of LG 11kg Front Load Washing Machine in Middle Black (WFR1114MB)
LG 11kg Front Load Washing Machine — Middle Black hero shot

modules.head: Intelligent Care with 18% More Fabric Protection
modules.body: Based on big data of accumulated washing experience, AI DD™ delivers the optimised washing motion to care for your laundry — up to 18% more fabric protection compared to standard motion.
modules.disc: *Tested by Intertek. Compared to LG washers with Inverter DirectDrive motor without AI DD. Results may vary depending on fabric type.

imgs.a: AI DD with 18% more fabric protection

modules.head: What is AI DD™?
modules.body: AI DD™ detects not only the weight, but also senses the softness of fabric, and it chooses the optimal wash motions for the fabric automatically — no manual programme selection required.

imgs.a: How AI DD senses fabric weight and softness

modules.head: Less Time, More Life
modules.body: TurboWash™ cleans your clothes in just 59 minutes. Spend less time on laundry and more time living — without compromising on cleaning performance.
modules.disc: *Tested by Intertek. TurboWash cycle with 3kg load. Results may vary.

modules.head: Less Wrinkles, More Hygienic
modules.body: LG Steam™ technology eliminates 99.9% of allergens such as dust mites that can cause allergy or respiratory issues — while reducing wrinkles by up to 30% during the wash cycle.
modules.disc: *Allergen reduction tested by TÜV Rheinland. Wrinkle reduction tested by Intertek. Results may vary.

imgs.a: LG Steam — less wrinkles, more hygienic

modules.head: 30% Less Wrinkles
modules.body: Wrinkles formed during dehydration are reduced through steam applied during the tumble motion — clothes come out smoother and easier to iron.

imgs.a: 30% less wrinkles via Steam during tumble

modules.head: 99.9% Allergen Removal
modules.body: Airborne and fabric allergens are reduced up to 99.9% by Steam — ideal for families with sensitive skin, asthma or allergy sufferers.

modules.head: Bigger Capacity in the Same Space
modules.body: Get bigger drum capacity in the same slim footprint — 11kg of washing power in a compact 600 × 850 × 565 mm body that fits easily into modern laundry spaces.

imgs.a: Bigger drum capacity in same slim size

modules.head: More Durable and Hygienic
modules.body: Features a durable tempered glass door and hygienic stainless steel drum with a slim stainless lifter — engineered for long-lasting performance and easy cleaning.

imgs.a: Durable tempered glass door and stainless steel drum

modules.head: More Visible and Elegant
modules.body: Redesigned with a more visible LED display and larger knob with metallic finish — premium Middle Black body color complements modern interiors beautifully.

imgs.a: More visible LED display with metallic-finish knob

modules.head: Smart Appliance — Operate from Anywhere
modules.body: With LG ThinQ™, your washer just got smarter. Start cycles remotely, download new wash programs, monitor energy use, and access Smart Diagnosis™ — all via Wi-Fi through your smartphone.
modules.disc: *LG ThinQ™ app available on compatible Android and iOS devices. Wi-Fi connection and product registration required.
